# Skelly — Website with AI Content Management

> This website is built with Astro (frontend) and Strapi (CMS). It has a built-in MCP server for AI-assisted content management.

## MCP Server

This site exposes an MCP (Model Context Protocol) server that lets AI assistants manage content.

- Endpoint: /mcp (Streamable HTTP)
- Legacy SSE: /mcp/sse + /mcp/messages
- Discovery: /.well-known/mcp.json
- Full setup guide: /llms-full.txt

## Authentication

The MCP server uses Strapi API tokens for authentication. The user must:

1. Create an API token in their Strapi admin panel (at /strapi/admin → Settings → API Tokens)
2. Include it in their MCP client config as an Authorization header: `Bearer <token>`

See /llms-full.txt for step-by-step token creation instructions and per-tool configuration examples.

## Available tools

- list_content_types — See what content types exist (articles, etc.)
- list_entries — List entries with pagination and sorting
- get_entry — Get a single entry by ID or field value
- create_entry — Create new content
- update_entry — Edit existing content
- delete_entry — Permanently delete content
- publish_entry — Make a draft visible on the website
- unpublish_entry — Hide content from the website
- upload_media — Upload an image or file from a URL
- list_media — Browse the media library

## Site structure

- / — Homepage
- /articles — Article listing
- /articles/{slug} — Individual article
- /contact — Contact form
- /politique-de-confidentialite — Privacy policy
